text.title: predictive-analytics-pm Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for predictive-analytics-pm as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Garbage-in status fields — "In Progress" means "abandoned" or "waiting for review" depending on the team member.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every metric computed from inconsistent status fields lies. A model trained on this data will forecast confidently based on noise. Data quality discipline is a prerequisite to any forecasting investment.

failure-mode.description: Concept drift ignored — model trained on Q1 team composition and process used in Q4 after three re-orgs and a process overhaul.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ML models learn the statistical regularities of a specific team and process. When the team or process changes significantly, the model's learned patterns are no longer valid. Silent drift produces increasingly wrong but equally confident forecasts.

failure-mode.description: Survivorship bias — training data includes only completed projects, excluding cancelled and silent-fail projects.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cancelled projects carry the failure patterns the model most needs to learn. A dataset of completions only under-predicts cancellation risk and over-predicts completion probability.

failure-mode.description: Uncalibrated probabilities — model emits "70% likely to slip" without a calibration dataset to validate that claim.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An uncalibrated probability is an opinion dressed as a number. PM teams that make budget or scope decisions on uncalibrated confidence intervals will be systematically misled.

failure-mode.description: Causal claims from correlational features — "long descriptions correlate with overrun" → PM bans long descriptions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Correlation in issue data is not causal. Intervening on a correlate without understanding the mechanism often removes a useful signal without changing the underlying cause.

failure-mode.description: Per-person productivity metrics emitted from issue data (velocity per developer, bug rate per engineer).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Individual-level metrics from trackers are an HR and legal risk, incentivize gaming (artificially inflating closed tickets), and destroy the team-level signal that makes forecasting valuable.

failure-mode.description: Stale snapshot forecast — forecast generated yesterday from data a week old, presented as current to stakeholders.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: PM data ages fast; a week-old snapshot misses the sprint that just closed, the risk that materialized, or the scope change that was approved. Every forecast must show a data-freshness timestamp.

failure-mode.description: LLMs asked "predict when this will finish" hallucinate confident dates; force them to emit only ranges with explicit "model output X says" citations.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs lack the ability to generate calibrated uncertainty; they default to confident predictions that feel authoritative but are unreliable.

failure-mode.description: Per-person productivity outputs are an HR landmine — refuse to generate; aggregate to team or workstream.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Individual metrics invite performance management abuse and destroy psychological safety.

failure-mode.description: Calibration drifts silently; without monitoring agents will keep forecasting poorly with high confidence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Drift detection requires continuous monitoring; it does not happen automatically.

failure-mode.description: LLMs love to weave causal claims ("Bob's stories slip because Bob is overloaded") from purely correlational features. Strip causal language.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents will confidently make causal claims without statistical basis; this leads to interventions that do not work and erode trust in forecasting.

failure-mode.description: Survivorship bias: training data excludes cancelled projects; agents will under-predict cancellation risk. Add explicit cancellation labels.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Models learn only from observed outcomes; missing data on failures makes them blind to failure modes.

failure-mode.description: Privacy: comment text used as a feature can leak PII into model logs; redact before training.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Issue comments often contain personal information; using raw text violates privacy expectations and may violate GDPR/CCPA.

failure-mode.description: Stale snapshots: a forecast generated yesterday on data from a week ago is worthless; agents must show data-freshness timestamp.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: PM decisions move fast; a stale forecast leads to decisions on outdated information.

failure-mode.description: Auto-actioning a forecast (e.g., auto-escalating "at-risk") creates feedback loops in the data; route to humans.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Automated actions change the data distribution on which the model was trained, invalidating future calibration.

failure-mode.description: Power-BI/Tableau dashboards from agents often miss row-level security; verify before publishing.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Dashboards can leak sensitive data if not configured with proper access controls.

failure-mode.description: Human-in-the-loop checkpoints (mandatory): release of new model, threshold tuning, retraining cadence change, escalation rules.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These gates prevent silent failures and keep humans accountable for model behavior in the organization.
